fork_replace_strategy: Open replacement or local-fork review if a claimed-backend bug or hot-path budget blocker cannot be corrected inside one release family without waiting on upstream.
Open replacement or local-fork review if claimed-platform windowing, DPI, or accessibility-root requirements can no longer be met without per-platform shell forks.
Replace the window-present stub once the GPU-backed renderer surface is admitted; keep the shell frame and zone registry contracts intact.
Open replacement or local-fork review if claimed-script shaping correctness or shaping-budget targets cannot be met inside one release family without upstream changes.
Open replacement or local-fork review if claimed glyph rasterisation fidelity or budget cannot be met inside one release family without upstream changes.
Open replacement or local-fork review if claimed font discovery and fallback resolution cannot be met inside one release family without upstream changes.
Open replacement or local-fork review if claimed accessibility-tree exposure cannot be met across target platforms without per-platform forks.
Pin and vendor a redistributable fallback-font set with recorded license terms; replace the source if redistribution terms or coverage no longer satisfy claimed scripts.
